reviewer.evidence_ref: subagent final review in current runtime session

summary: The independent reviewer first found evidence_ref and repository-integrity blockers. After repairs, final re-review found no remaining information-sufficiency gate bypasses or repository-integrity blockers.

initial_findings_repaired.finding: Blocking fact evidence_ref could point to a nonexistent file and still pass.
initial_findings_repaired.repair: control_chain_guard.py, control_json_runtime.py, and orchestration_guard.py now require evidence_ref to resolve to an existing file inside the run directory.

initial_findings_repaired.finding: S3 and final runtime counterexample gate were not yet recorded.
initial_findings_repaired.repair: This evidence file records the independent review and the runtime will append S3 plus counterexample.review.completed after this file exists.

initial_findings_repaired.finding: Historical regressions did not cover nonexistent evidence_ref, before-policy routing, and required_observations substitution.
Skill hot paths exceeded repository limits and the new test was missing from MANIFEST.txt.
initial_findings_repaired.repair: The two SKILL.md files were compressed below 650 words and MANIFEST.txt now includes tests/skills/test_information_sufficiency_gate.py.

final_review.reviewer_statement: S1-S5 plus final runtime counterexample gate can be validly recorded; a temporary copy with S3 completion, counterexample.review.completed, and final-report.json verified goal_achieved_permitted true.
